nodes.name: 山地森林
nodes.summary: 以成熟阔叶林和混交林为主的山地森林系统。

nodes.name: 森林砍伐
nodes.summary: 原生林被砍伐导致栖息地面积和连通性下降。

nodes.name: 马尼拉
nodes.summary: 马尼拉是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Luzon scops owl，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Luzon scops owl
nodes.summary: Luzon scops owl（Luzon scops owl，学名 Otus longicornis），在图谱中标记为无危（LC）物种，已关联9个分布地点节点，常见栖息地包括山地森林，主要威胁包括栖息地破坏、森林砍伐。

nodes.name: 北伊羅戈省
nodes.summary: 北伊羅戈省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Luzon scops owl，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 雨林
nodes.summary: 雨林是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联99种鸟类，包括叢塚雉、鳳冠孔雀雉、Amboyna cuckoo-dove等99种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: Luzon tropical pine forests

nodes.name: 新怡詩夏省
nodes.summary: 新怡詩夏省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Luzon scops owl，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 栖息地破坏
nodes.summary: 开发、采伐和围垦等活动导致适宜生境减少。

nodes.name: 奎松省
nodes.summary: 奎松省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联2种鸟类，包括Luzon scops owl、菲律賓三趾翠鳥，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: 伊莎貝拉省
nodes.summary: 伊莎貝拉省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Luzon scops owl，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

nodes.name: LC
nodes.summary: LC表示 IUCN 无危等级，当前关联8208种鸟类，如鸵鸟、鸸鹋、南方鶴鴕等8208种鸟类。

links.label: 分布于
links.evidence: The Luzon scops owl is known to be found in rainforest, montane forest, and tropical pine forest habitats at altitudes generally ranging anywhere from 350 to 1,800 m, but it may also be found at heights upwards of 2,200m. Although its habitat range across Luzon appears to be relatively large, it is noted to be uncommon and has a patchy distribution that corresponds to its preferred, highland habitats. It has been recorded primarily in northern Luzon provinces such as Ilocos Norte, Benguet, Cagayan, Isabela, Nueva Ecija, or near Manila in Bulacan and Quezon

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: There is no known information on population size and little known on population trends besides the high likelihood that it is decreasing. This species is still declining due to habitat loss

links.label: 受威胁于
links.evidence: Activities that contribute to deforestation such as logging, mining and the growth of agricultural land in the region of Luzon pose a threat to its endemic species. It is heavily suggested that critical habitats for the Luzon scops owl and other endangered or threatened birds be protected at all altitudes
